title: Buyer short-closes a PO line because supplier can't deliver the rest
user_persona: Buyer closing out a line that won't be fully delivered

conversation.user: On PO-2026-805, line 3 we ordered 100 units but supplier can only deliver the 60 already received. Short-close the rest.

bot_must: confirm line 3 status: 60 received of 100 ordered
explain short-close will close the remaining 40, marking line as fully closed
if all other lines also fully delivered/closed: report PO status now Closed; otherwise: PO status remains Open

expected_terminal_state.po_status: Open or Closed depending on other lines

evaluation_metrics.po_status_implication: bot reports whether full PO closure follows
